zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Bertram de Monbourcher of Horton Castle於1337年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋時，他的父親Sir Reginald de Monboucher22歲，母親Isabel Lady Willoughby22歲。他於1358年2月與Christiana de Widdrington結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1382年被列為collector of taxes, northumberland。他去世於1388年8月6日在英國諾圖波藍德納費斯享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bertram
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from berht ‘bright, famous’ + hramn ‘raven’. Ravens were traditional symbols of wisdom in Germanic mythology; Odin was regularly accompanied by ravens called Hugin and Munin. This name was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. See also Bertrand .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Bertram de Monbourcher of Horton Castle was born in 1337, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Reginald de Monboucher, was 22 and his mother, Isabel Lady Willoughby, was 22. He married Christiana de Widdrington in February 1358. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. In 1382, at the age of 45, his occupation is listed as collector of taxes, northumberland. He died on 6 August 1388, in Tynemouth, Northumberland, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Bertram de Monbourcher of Horton Castle est né en 1337, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Reginald de Monboucher, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Isabel Lady Willoughby, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Christiana de Widdrington en février 1358. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. En 1382, à l’âge de 45 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est collector of taxes, northumberland. Il est décédé le 6 août 1388, à Tynemouth, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Bertram de Monbourcher of Horton Castle 1337 in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Reginald de Monboucher 22 und seine Mutter Isabel Lady Willoughby 22. Er hat im Februar 1358 Christiana de Widdrington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. 1382, als er 45 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als collector of taxes, northumberland aufgeführt. Er starb am 6. August 1388 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Tynemouth, Northumberland, England.

Lui sposato Christiana de Widdrington nel febbraio 1358. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Bertram de Monbourcher of Horton Castleが1337年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインで生まれた時，父Sir Reginald de Monboucherは22歳，母Isabel Lady Willoughbyは22歳であった。1358年2月にChristiana de Widdringtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1382年，45歳の時，職業はcollector of taxes, northumberlandと記録されている。彼は1388年8月6日にイギリスノースウンバーランドトイネモウスで51歳で死去した。

영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Bertram de Monbourcher of Horton Castle(이)가 1337년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Reginald de Monboucher(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Lady Willoughby(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1358년 2월 Christiana de Widdrington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1382년, 45세의 나이로 그의 직업은 collector of taxes, northumberland이었다. 그는 1388년 8월 6일 영국 노르스벌랜드 타이네모우스에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Bertram de Monbourcher of Horton Castle nasceu em 1337, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Reginald de Monboucher, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Lady Willoughby, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Christiana de Widdrington em fevereiro de 1358. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Em 1382, com 45 anos, sua profissão aparece como collector of taxes, northumberland. Ele faleceu em 6 de agosto de 1388, em Tynemouth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Bertram de Monbourcher of Horton Castle родился в 1337 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Reginald de Monboucher было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Lady Willoughby, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Christiana de Widdrington февраль 1358 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1382 году, в возрасте 45 лет,  он работал по профессии collector of taxes, northumberland. Он умер 6 августа 1388 г. в местности тинемоут, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Bertram de Monbourcher of Horton Castle nació en 1337, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Reginald de Monboucher, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Isabel Lady Willoughby, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Christiana de Widdrington en febrero de 1358. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. En 1382, a la edad de 45 años, su ocupación registrada era collector of taxes, northumberland. Murió el 6 de agosto de 1388, en Tynemouth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años.
